ground.what_this_is: This is a mobile interface for setting your 'presence' or work posture, displayed as a floating sheet at the bottom of the screen.
ground.what_you_can_do: Tap the 'focus' pill at the top to open this sheet; select one of the eight available modes (like 'listening' or 'text-only') to change your current posture; and use the bottom navigation bar to switch between other main app sections.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (Toolbar.tsx); changing the available modes requires updating the MODES registry.
howto.what: The presence mode selector on the toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Tap this to open the sheet and select a work posture (like 'focus' or 'listening') that changes which verbs the system offers and how it speaks.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the mode is a configuration change there.
howto.what: The text-only response mode on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this mode to force the system to reply only in concise text, ignoring visual or complex reasoning outputs.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence sheet region (presence.tsx); changing the text or logic is a code change there.
howto.what: The minimal presence surface that surfaces only what genuinely needs you; otherwise a one-line ack.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the current minimal presence state or the single-line acknowledgement required for the current posture.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence sheet region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the narration behavior is a code change there.
howto.what: The narration control on the presence sheet.
howto.what_you_can_do: Activate the system's active guidance mode to narrate steps and direct attention.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the observation text or logic requires a code change there.
howto.what: The observation indicator on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the system's current posture (e.g., 'Observes over your shoulder') and its commentary style; it reflects the active RHM mode selected via the presence dial.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the logic is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'decide-for-me' control on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Tap this to trigger the system to autonomously select the best available presence mode (e.g., switching from 'listening' to 'focus') based on current context.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the toggle state is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'no self-approve' toggle on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to disable the system's ability to autonomously approve actions; when off, the RHM must seek external authorization before acting.

howto.how_to_change: It is the 'Canvas' link in the .tabbar region (App.tsx); changing its label or icon is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'Canvas' navigation button in the mobile tabbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Tap this to switch the mobile view to the main board surface where work is composed.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the displayed directives requires updating the mode definition in the MODES registry.
howto.what: The directive display on the presence dial showing the current mode's capabilities.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the current mode's active capabilities and directives; this view confirms the system's current posture and what it is authorized to do.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the tabbar region (App.tsx); changing the label or icon is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'Inbox' tab in the mobile navigation bar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this tab to switch the main view to the inbox surface where decisions and approvals are managed.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (1 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the tabbar region (App.tsx); changing the action is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'Run' command in the mobile navigation bar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Tap this to initiate the system's active execution cycle.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.
